recommended_actions.action: HUMAN REVIEW: WIN-014 verdict upgrade Misleading → Self-Contradicted (ISS-1335). Curmudgeon c3 finds that the dome simultaneously claims positive EM-gravity coupling (WIN-011/012) and null gravity results (WIN-013/014) — classic Self-Contradicted pattern. Current verdict is Misleading. Changing would shift the narrative — needs human sign-off.
